title: Etsy Third Quarter 2024 Earnings: Revenues Beat Expectations, EPS Lags
text: Etsy reported Q3 2024 revenue of $662.4 million, which beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.31%. Third-quarter 2024 earnings of $0.45 per share missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 16.67%. Marketplace revenue increased 3.3% to $476.1 million, while Services revenue grew 6.2% to $186.3 million. The marketplace's gross merchandise sales fell 4.1% to $2.92 billion, down from $3.04 billion in the same period a year earlier. Net income for Q3 2024 was $57.4 million, a significant decline of 34.7% compared to $87.9 million in Q3 2023. The company maintained a healthy adjusted EBITDA margin of approximately 28%, despite macroeconomic challenges. Etsy anticipated a decline in consolidated GMS in the low to mid-single-digit percentage range for the fourth quarter, reflecting ongoing consumer pressure.
